name: mol-plugin
description: Maintenance toolkit for the molcrafts marketplace itself. Four skills: /mol-plugin:new-skill (scaffold a complete SKILL.md and register it in the plugin README), /mol-plugin:check (structural self-audit, parallel to /mol-agent:check for projects), /mol-plugin:janitor (content self-audit — clarity, orthogonality, brevity across every SKILL.md and agent), /mol-plugin:release (unified version bump + local commit + local tag; gates through /mol:ship commit; pair with /mol:tag to push the tag to upstream).
